title: The Road to Sabaody
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've never had takoyaki before! They're delicious-!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUU-!! Everything's free for you guys today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Um... how is it? ... Umm... nami...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All Rinnight!! You guys keep on eating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You can't leave without a proper goodbye!!!

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: It's handsome...!! Ah!! No, that's not right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh, man!! Young Master Black leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After you kicked me in the face,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now the girls won't leave me alone.

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody.
